steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content: The blank sits between "including" and the noun phrase "the Madurese and Bikol." The whole list is already enclosed in em-dashes ("—including ______ the Madurese and Bikol, which...—"), so the parenthetical is already set off.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content: "Including" functions here as a preposition introducing the items in the list. No punctuation is needed between "including" and its object; adding a colon, em-dash, or comma would over-punctuate the parenthetical that's already inside em-dashes. The answer is A (no punctuation).
